series_metadata.series_description: Documentation includes requests for public records, public records receipt and response log, and copies of specific records provided.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: two years or audited by Ohio Auditor of State''s office and biennial audit report is released, whichever is later. ; Electronic: two years or audited by Ohio Auditor of State''s office and biennial audit report is released, whichever is later
